prestazioni: Engine swap to a GM LY5 6.0L V8 (364ci, LS-based) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Callies crankshaft, Manley H-beam rods) and a custom camshaft (Comp Cams 281HR+3, 236/242 duration, .624/.624 lift) for high-RPM torque retention, paired with a Magnuson TVS2300 supercharger (12psi boost) and a custom intercooler setup (Vortech air-to-water core with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps and ID1000 injectors) to achieve 650whp on E85.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: NV4500 5-speed manual transmission swap with a South Bend dual-disc clutch (SDD3600), custom driveshafts (Spicer 1350 series U-joints), and a Detroit Truetrac differential in the 4.10:1 gear ratio Dana 60 rear axle (with ARB Air Locker for front Dana 44). Suspension upgraded to King Shocks 2.5" Remote Reservoir Coilovers (14" travel) with custom valving for rock crawling, paired with Polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension) and a 3.5" suspension lift (Rough Country) to clear 37" Nitto Trail Grappler tires on Method MR701 wheels (17x9, +18 offset).

Forced induction and cooling: Custom 4" turbo-back exhaust system (Stainless Works headers, 304 stainless piping, Borla Pro XS mufflers) with a Tial 44mm wastegate and dual 3.5" downpipes. Cooling system upgraded with a Mishimoto aluminum radiator, dual 16" SPAL fans, and a Derale remote oil cooler (19-row) with a Canton catch can system to manage LS crankcase pressure under boost.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody conversion (H3T-specific kit, bolt-on fender flares with carbon fiber overlay) paired with a custom front bumper (Hammerhead Offroad HD winch bumper with integrated Baja Designs Squadron Pro lights) and a rear bumper (Fab Fours Lo-Pro with swing-out tire carrier). Hood replaced with a carbon fiber vented unit (Seibon) featuring a functional heat extractor for the supercharger.

Exterior lighting upgraded to Oracle Lighting LED halo headlights (RGB+White, 6000K) with a custom Morimoto HID projector retrofit, paired with Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights and a Baja Designs LP9 auxiliary light bar (50" curved, 40" straight) mounted on a custom roof rack (Prinsu Designs). Wheels finished in a custom Cerakote "Havoc Bronze" with beadlock rings (Method MR701).

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full custom roll cage (Chromoly, 4-point with harness bar) wrapped in Alcantara (Stingray Blue), Recaro SRD seats (900 series, FIA-approved), and a custom dash overlay (Vinyl Wrap Designs, carbon fiber texture). Audio system upgraded to a Kicker KXA800.5 amplifier (1600W RMS) powering a set of Focal Utopia Be tweeters and Kicker Solo-Baric L7 subwoofers (dual 12", sealed enclosure) with a Pioneer AVH-W4500NEX head unit.
